= Kobiton 4.27 Release Notes
:navtitle: Kobiton 4.27 release notes

_June 2026_

== Bug fixes and improvements

=== Integration settings

- Removed the *Figma* and *SauceLabs* integrations from *Settings > Integration*. Both integrations were no longer supported. The *Integration* tab now shows *Issue Tracking (Jira)*, *TestRail*, and *Visual Validation (Applitools)*.
